project_context.domain: Freelance Web Development Portfolio / Landing Page Services
project_context.archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) mixed with High-End Tech

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-16 for inner card padding, and py-24 to py-32 for section padding.

surfaces_and_borders.cards: bg-[#1A1B1F]/50 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/30 transition-colors duration-300

hero_background.description: Dark gold abstract swirls. Use as an ultra-low opacity (10-15%) overlay behind the hero section with mask-image fading to bottom.

personal_photo.description: Gustavo Borges personal photo. Use in the 'Sobre' section.

portfolio_mockups.description: Fallback laptop mockup image if iframe previews cannot be rendered due to CORS/X-Frame-Options.

header.content: Logo 'Gustavo Borges' on left. Nav links in center. 'WhatsApp' primary button on right.

hero.layout: Center-aligned, massive emphasis on typography. Generous negative space.
hero.title: Criação de Landing Pages que Aumentam a Visibilidade do Seu Negócio
hero.subtitle: Receba seu site pronto em até 1 dia, com suporte completo para domínio e publicação.
ctas: Primary: '🔥 Solicitar meu site' (bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-semibold rounded-full px-8 py-4, hover:bg-[#F5D97A] shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)]) - Links to WhatsApp

about.layout: 2-column grid. Left: Image of Gustavo. Right: Bio text.
about.content: Sou desenvolvedor especializado em landing pages para comércios físicos e digitais. Meu foco é simples: transformar visitantes em clientes, com páginas rápidas, modernas e otimizadas.
about.image_treatment: Use the personal_photo URL. Place it inside a card with a subtle gold glowing border.

benefits.styling: Cards with icons (@phosphor-icons/react or lucide-react in gold). Smooth hover effects.

portfolio.preview_strategy: Attempt to use scaled <iframe src='...'> wrapped in a container with pointer-events-none and overflow-hidden to act as a live thumbnail. If iframe fails, use the fallback laptop mockup media URL. Include an external link button 'Acessar Site'.

how_it_works.layout: Vertical timeline or 5-step horizontal bento sequence.
how_it_works.steps: 5 passos simples (Define 5 logical steps like: 1. Contato, 2. Briefing, 3. Design, 4. Revisão, 5. Lançamento).

proof_and_guarantee.guarantee: Entrego seu site em até 24h ou você não paga pela urgência.
proof_and_guarantee.counter: Dynamic counter '+10 sites entregues'. Fetch from backend (mock API response if not ready, but ensure it's a dynamic React state).
proof_and_guarantee.niches: Display badges for: restaurantes, lojas, serviços, salões de festa. Badges should have border-[#D4AF37]/50 text-[#D4AF37].

footer_and_cta.cta: Pronto para colocar seu negócio no digital?
footer_and_cta.tagline: Não sou o nadador, mas sei mergulhar fundo no que realmente importa: resultados.
footer_and_cta.floating_action: Add a fixed floating WhatsApp button at bottom right (z-50).

animation_guidelines.rules: Fade-up on scroll for all sections. Staggered fade-ins for bento cards and portfolio items. Smooth hover scaling (1.02) on cards.

testing.rules: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) must include data-testid. e.g., data-testid='hero-whatsapp-btn'
